scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,convex,renderer,palettes -c blue,magenta,green,cyan "pnpm dev:frontend" "pnpm dev:convex" "pnpm dev:renderer" "pnpm dev:palettes"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n frontend,convex,renderer,bot,palettes -c blue,magenta,green,yellow,cyan "pnpm dev:frontend" "pnpm dev:convex" "pnpm dev:renderer" "pnpm dev:bot" "pnpm dev:palettes"
scripts.dev:convex: cd frontend && pnpm exec convex dev
scripts.dev:renderer: cd backend/renderer_service && portless renderer sh -c '.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn renderer_service.app.main:app --reload --host $HOST --port $PORT'
scripts.dev:palettes: cd frontend && pnpm exec tsx scripts/watch-renderer-palettes.ts
